assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: The output in staleness-check.md references the parsed ISO 8601 timestamp: 'The `Last-Updated` timestamp of `2026-05-01T10:00:00Z`' (line 30-31). Each stream section also shows the parsed value: 'was last updated on 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z' (lines 9 and 19).

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: The summary in staleness-check.md states: 'exceeds the 14-day staleness threshold by 56 days (current date: 2026-07-10)' (lines 30-32). Both streams display staleness warnings with the note 'The matrix may not reflect recent releases' (lines 10 and 20).

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: Each warning includes all three elements. For stream 2.1.x (line 9): stream name '2.1.x', last-updated date '2026-05-01T10:00:00Z', days '70 days ago'. For stream 2.2.x (line 19): stream name '2.2.x', last-updated date '2026-05-01T10:00:00Z', days '70 days ago'.

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: Both stream warnings present three numbered options (lines 12-14 and 22-24): (1) 'Refresh now — re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', (2) 'Proceed anyway — continue triage with the current matrix', (3) 'Stop — halt triage so I can investigate'.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: The only output file is staleness-check.md (Step 0.3). It contains no Jira API calls or Jira-related operations. The file ends with 'Awaiting user choice before proceeding with triage' (line 34), confirming execution halted after the staleness check and before any subsequent steps including Step 0.5.
